hooks.name: godoctor-block-replace
hooks.description: Blocks the native replace tool to enforce smart_edit usage.

hooks.name: godoctor-block-read
hooks.description: Blocks the native read tool to enforce smart_read usage.

hooks.name: godoctor-block-write
hooks.description: Blocks the native write tool to enforce smart_edit usage.

hooks.name: godoctor-block-shell
hooks.description: Blocks inefficient shell usage (go build, sed, grep) to enforce MCP tool usage.
